GET QUOTES

Build your pool without stress, guesswork or risk

Get expert pool design, real quotes from quality builders, and side-by-side comparisons - without chasing a single tradie.

customers

builders
As seen on:

The pool building process is broken.
And backwards.

Most homeowners start by chasing random pool builders online... Getting vague quotes. No design. No plans. No idea of who to trust. That's a recipe for regret - and it's costing people time, money and stress.
Australia's most trusted pool building service

EasyBuild gives you what builders don't.

Clarity

We create a 3D design and detailed plans of your pool before you engage any builders.
Read more

Control

You compare real, apples-to-apples quotes from trusted pool builders.
Read more

Confidence

You make smart decisions, backed by expert advice, not sales pressure.
Read more

The pool building process is broken

Most homeowners start by chasing random builders online...
Getting vague quotes. No plans. No idea who to trust.
That's a recipe for regret - an it's costing people time, stress and money.

The pool building process is broken. And backwards.

Most homeowners start by chasing random pool builders online...
Getting vague quotes. Do design. No plans. No idea of who to trust.
That's a recipe for regret - and it's costing people time, money and stress.

EasyBuild gives you what builders don't:

Clarity

We create a 3D design and detailed plans of your pool before you speak to any builders.

Control

You compare real, apples-to-apples quotes from trusted professionals.

Confidence

You make smart decisions, backed by expert advice, not sales pressure.

The pool building process is broken. And backwards.

Most homeowners start by chasing random pool builders online...
Getting vague quotes. Do design. No plans. No idea of who to trust.
That's a recipe for regret - and it's costing people time, money and stress.

EasyBuild gives you what builders don't:

Clarity

We create a 3D design and detailed plans of your pool before you speak to any builders.

Control

You compare real, apples-to-apples quotes from trusted professionals.

Confidence

You make smart decisions, backed by expert advice, not sales pressure.

How it works

No sales pitch. Just expert support.
1

Independent expert consultation

We give you clear, independent advice - on pool types, pricing, site challenges, and next steps - so you feel informed and empowered.
2

Get a free 3D pool design

Our design team brings your vision to life with a pool to suit your space and budget - providing guidance on costs and complexities.
3

We lock down the scope

You make smart decisions, backed by expert advice, not sales pressure - resulting in a detailed scope ready for builders to bid on your project.
4

Get real quotes from builders we trust

Verified, high-quality builders we trust bid competitively on your project - and you get to compare the results side-by-side.

The problem with the old way

It leaves you chasing pool builders, guessing at prices, and hoping for the best.
You talk to 6+ pool builders to get 3 wildly different quotes.
None of the pool builders are quoting the same thing.
You don't know what's included or what's missing.
You end up choosing based on guesswork.

Why Poolz is different

If you're planning to spend $60,000+ on a new swimming pool and outdoor area, investing the first $1,000 in a design will be the best money you spend.

We don't work with everyone

We don't support pool builders who fall short - no matter how big they are.

We've already vetted the builders.

We've reviewed their work, spoken to peers and clients, and checked their history.

We know who's doing quality work - and who's not.

We track projects, client feedback, and consistency - so you don't have to guess.

And if a builder slips? They're out. That's our promise.

One bad job can remove them from our network. We protect you - always.
GET STARTED

Build your pool the smart way

Get a custom pool plan, a 3D design, and 3 competitive quotes - all completely free and expertly managed from start to finish.

No stress, just results - all at no cost

Skip the hassle of multiple site visits, endless calls, and confusing quotes. EasyBuild gives you 3 competitive, clear quotes from trusted builders, based on a plan that's ready to go.

Export support from start to finish

From the initial 3D design to the final contract, your EasyBuild expert will guide you every step of the way, making it easy to get the pool you want at the best value.
get started

The questions you should be asking

Smart homeowners ask better questions - and we love answering them.
How is this free?

We're paid by the builder - but not just any builder.

We only work with a small network of trusted, vetted builders who meet our standards.

It doesn’t cost you a cent, and there’s zero pressure to choose anyone.

How is this free?

We're paid by the builder - but not just any builder.

We only work with a small network of trusted, vetted builders who meet our standards.

It doesn’t cost you a cent, and there’s zero pressure to choose anyone.

How do I know the builders are actually good?

We say no to more builders than we say yes to.

We’ve checked their work, verified their licenses, spoken to past clients, and track performance over time.

If a builder slips - they’re out. Simple.

How do I know the builders are actually good?

We say no to more builders than we say yes to.

We’ve checked their work, verified their licenses, spoken to past clients, and track performance over time.

If a builder slips - they’re out. Simple.

Is the design really custom?

Yes. 100%.

We design your pool based on your property, your lifestyle, and your budget - not a prefab template.

It’s tailored to your space and vision - before you spend a cent.

Is the design really custom?

Yes. 100%.

We design your pool based on your property, your lifestyle, and your budget - not a prefab template.

It’s tailored to your space and vision - before you spend a cent.

Will using Poolz make my pool more expensive?

No. Here's why: when we create a detailed scope and design upfront, builders don't have to guess - or pad the quote to cover unknowns. They quote more accurately and more competitively, because they're bidding on the same clear brief.

Will using Poolz make my pool more expensive?

No. Here's why: when we create a detailed scope and design upfront, builders don't have to guess - or pad the quote to cover unknowns. They quote more accurately and more competitively, because they're bidding on the same clear brief.

What you get with EasyBuild

1
Expert pool design (valued at $1,995 - yours free)
2
Locked-in scope with inclusions clearly detailed
3
Side-by-side quotes from trusted pool builders
4
Access to pool builders who actually call you back
5
Independent support - we're on your side
The best place to find pool building professionals.
